description: DnaJ heat shock protein family (Hsp40) member B11 [Source:HGNC Symbol;Acc:HGNC:14889]
ciliary_role: Mutations in the DNAJB11 gene cause Renal-hepatic-pancreatic Dysplasia and Autosomal Dominant Polycystic Kidney Disease (PMID: 33129895, 29706351).
ciliopathy_type: Autosomal Dominant Polycystic Kidney Disease, Renal-hepatic-pancreatic Dysplasia

ai_summary.basic_summary: DNAJB11 is a ciliary gene encoding dnaj heat shock protein family (hsp40) member b11 [source:hgnc symbol;acc:hgnc:14889]
ai_summary.functional_summary: Mutations in the DNAJB11 gene cause Renal-hepatic-pancreatic Dysplasia and Autosomal Dominant Polycystic Kidney Disease (PMID: 33129895, 29706351).
ai_summary.localization_summary: Localizes to Ciliary associated gene, Endoplasmic, Nucleus
ai_summary.disease_summary: Associated with Autosomal Dominant Polycystic Kidney Disease, Renal-hepatic-pancreatic Dysplasia
ai_summary.clinical_relevance: Associated with Autosomal Dominant Polycystic Kidney Disease, Renal-hepatic-pancreatic Dysplasia
